query:
Perform a LinkedIn-only research on Linear (linear.app) in three sequential steps.

STEP 1 — Find the exact LinkedIn company page URL for Linear (format: linkedin.com/company/<slug>). The slug is derived from the company name or website domain.

STEP 2 — Scrape that LinkedIn company page and return the profile details: linkedin_url, plus the 5 most senior CURRENT EMPLOYEES of Linear from the People tab (CEO, CTO, CPO, co-founders, VP-level). For each person: name, current role AT Linear (not at a previous employer), exact personal profile URL (linkedin.com/in/<slug>), and a one-sentence background that begins with their current role at Linear (e.g. 'Co-founder & CTO at Linear, ...'). Include only people who currently work at Linear — exclude external partners, customers, advisors, or event speakers merely mentioned in posts. If fewer than 5 verified employees can be found, return only the verified ones — do NOT pad with placeholders or null entries.

STEP 3 — Return the 3 to 5 MOST RECENT public posts from Linear's company page or its founders (last 12 months). For each: date (YYYY-MM-DD), author name, signal (post headline or first 150 chars), full post URL (linkedin.com/posts/...).

If a field cannot be retrieved from LinkedIn, OMIT it from the response. Do not fabricate values or pull from other sources. Do not invent placeholder data.
answer:
{"step_1_linkedin_company_page_url": "**linkedin_url:** `https://www.linkedin.com/company/linearapp`

The slug `linearapp` is confirmed from multiple LinkedIn-sourced references, including the company page itself and post URLs that reference the `linearapp` entity (e.g., `linkedin.com/posts/linearapp_...`).

---", "step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees": "| # | Name | Current Role at Linear | Personal LinkedIn URL | Background |
|---|------|----------------------|----------------------|------------|
| 1 | Karri Saarinen | Co-Founder, CEO | https://www.linkedin.com/in/karrisaarinen | Co-Founder & CEO at Linear, previously Principal Designer at Airbnb and Head of Design/founding designer at Coinbase, and co-founder of Kippt (YC S12), ArcticStartup, and Rails Girls. |
| 2 | Jori Lallo | Co-Founder, CPO | https://www.linkedin.com/in/jorilallo | Co-Founder & CPO at Linear, previously Software Engineer at Coinbase and Co-Founder of Kippt (YC S12), with an MSc in Telecommunications from Teknillinen korkeakoulu-Tekniska hogskolan. |
| 3 | Tuomas Artman | Co-Founder, CTO | https://www.linkedin.com/in/tuomasartman | Co-Founder & CTO at Linear, previously Senior Staff Engineer and Engineering Manager at Uber where he led a 400-person mobile engineering team, and earlier engineering leadership at Groupon, having studied Information Technology at the University of Helsinki. |
| 4 | Cristina Cordova | COO | https://www.linkedin.com/in/cristinajcordova | COO at Linear leading Go-To-Market and Operations, previously Partner at First Round Capital, Head of Platform & Partnerships at Notion, and held senior leadership roles at Stripe (2012-2020) including Head of Payments & Platform Partnerships and Business Lead for Corporate Card & Treasury, with a B.A. from Stanford University. |
| 5 | Nan Yu | Head of Product | https://www.linkedin.com/in/thenanyu | Head of Product at Linear, previously VP of Product and Interim CTO at Mode, Engineering Manager at Abstract, CTO at Everlane, with earlier roles as AVP at Bank of America and Software Engineer at Goldman Sachs, and a BS in EECS from UC Berkeley. |

All five individuals are confirmed as current employees of Linear based on their LinkedIn profiles (current company listed as Linear, active post activity as company representatives).

---", "step_3_5_most_recent_public_posts_last_12_months": "Dates are derived from relative timestamps visible on each LinkedIn post page (e.g., "3h", "1mo", "2mo", "3mo", "5mo"), anchored to the current date of 2026-06-11.

| # | Date | Author | Signal (headline / first 150 chars) | Full Post URL |
|---|------|--------|--------------------------------------|---------------|
| 1 | 2026-06-11 | Karri Saarinen | When we started Linear we wanted to make product work feel more coherent across the whole team. Agents can now do more of the work, but too often they operate from an empty prompt, in isolation | https://www.linkedin.com/posts/karrisaarinen_when-we-started-linear-we-wanted-to-make-activity-7470912905652396032-o6cS |
| 2 | 2026-05-11 | Karri Saarinen | On a recent call with founders there was an uncertaintly how much is AI actually helping our companies? I looked at our last two quarters: Q4 2025 - Q1 2026, Resolved work: 5,697 - 10,254 (+80%), Bug resolutions: 1,278 - 2,483 (+94%) | https://www.linkedin.com/posts/karrisaarinen_on-a-recent-call-with-founders-there-was-share-7449496635136692225-zO1y |
| 3 | 2026-04-11 | Cristina Cordova | Issue tracking is dead. We've been trapped in a handoff model where process became the work and engineering time was wasted on ceremony. That era is over. | https://www.linkedin.com/posts/cristinajcordova_issue-tracking-is-dead-weve-been-trapped-activity-7442272322087976960-tn9z |
| 4 | 2026-03-11 | Cristina Cordova | In January 2026 alone (the first month of our Q1), Linear added more net new revenue than we did in our entire first three years combined. Not every company begins with explosive growth. | https://www.linkedin.com/posts/cristinajcordova_were-hiring-linear-activity-7424148073733373952-jEGo |
| 5 | 2026-01-11 | Karri Saarinen | You've maybe heard from me on this topic too many times, but this is the last I'll offer (at least for now). My worry isn't the code or the tools themselves. | https://www.linkedin.com/posts/karrisaarinen_design-is-more-than-code-linear-activity-7407927165616504832-HOkD |

Note: Post dates are approximations derived from relative timestamps shown on each LinkedIn post page (3h, 1mo, 2mo, 3mo, 5mo relative to 2026-06-11). Exact calendar dates may differ by a few days from the approximations above."}
